brief: Evidence packet ties a verbal scope change to follow-up deliverables and shows the client approved final assets before withholding payment. Recommended binder order is agreement, change discussion excerpt, shipped files, then the unpaid invoice timeline.
searchSummary: invoice dispute, scope drift, approval trail
whyItMatters: One client record becomes part of a searchable proof trail.
searchIntro: One client record becomes part of a searchable proof trail. Search across the seeded records to feel that inside the app.
